archimate:DataObject.name: Regulated Professions DB
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The database contains information on regulated professions, statistics on migrating professionals, contact points and competent authorities, as provided by EU Member States, EEA countries, the UK and Switzerland.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: European Commission
Source: https://ec.europa.eu/growth/tools-databases/regprof/home
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Reference Data
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RegulatedProfessionsDBDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RegulatedProfessionsDBDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ReferenceData

properties.value: The database contains information on regulated professions, statistics on migrating professionals, contact points and competent authorities, as provided by EU Member States, EEA countries, the UK and Switzerland.
